title: Codex 自主设定目标，通用化元提示
full_text:
Tibo on X: "Codex can see and set its own /goal. Everything we build, we build also as a tool for the agent. This is a generalization of meta prompting, where you let the agent set its own task based on your intent." / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Tibo
@thsottiaux
Codex can see and set its own /goal. Everything we build, we build also as a tool for the agent. This is a generalization of meta prompting, where you let the agent set its own task based on your intent.
Pietro Schirano
@skirano
13h
I basically never write my own /goal anymore.
I ask Codex to write one for itself, and one for each agent it spawns.
Like this 👇
00:00

discovery_record.discovery_summary: Codex 可以查看并设置它自己的 /goal。 我们所构建的一切，也都是作为该智能体的工具而构建的。 这是元提示的一种泛化，即让智能体根据你的意图自行设定任务。
